notes: Network access to 99acres is blocked in this environment, so these are proxy 'price per sq ft' rates compiled from publicly available locality trend pages (e.g., Housing.com) plus a couple fallback locality rates (e.g., MagicBricks). Update these numbers if you have a newer/official source.

source_notes.primary: Housing.com locality price trends (avg price per sq ft)
fallbacks: MagicBricks locality rate snapshots (used where trends were missing)
